title: Cave Carver Feature
description: Carves a cave through the world in the current chunk, and in every chunk around the current chunk in an 8 radial pattern. This feature will also only work when placed specifically in the pass "pregeneration_pass".

cave_carver_feature_definition.title: Cave Carver Feature Definition
cave_carver_feature_definition.description: A single Cave Carver Feature Definition.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

fill_with.description: Optional. Reference to the block to fill the cave with.

width_modifier.description: Optional. How many blocks to increase the cave radius by, from the center point of the cave.

skip_carve_chance.description: Optional. The chance to skip doing the carve (1 / value).

height_limit.description: Optional. The height limit where we attempt to carve.
